underlying_goal: Refactor a task worker system in Laravel to replace legacy resolution patterns with convention-based worker resolution, eliminating all backward-compatibility code
friction_detail: Claude added legacy fallback paths the user explicitly didn't want, requiring the user to push back on a zero-legacy policy before Claude corrected course.
brief_summary: User drove a multi-phase refactoring of task worker resolution from legacy scanner-based to convention-based, with Claude making extensive cross-file changes across 50+ files and multiple commits, though Claude initially added unwanted backward-compatibility code.
